content.en:
In the years that followed, Ye Tian successively killed many emperors of the Golden God Ministry, and even some of the kings were not let go, and directly let the emperors and kings of the Golden God Department and the affiliated tribes hide in the formation and dare not come out.

And the powerhouses of the Dragon Disciple Tribe and the affiliated tribes besieged the emperor and king level of the Golden God Department.

If the Golden God Department hadn't thought of any other way, the next battle would have been almost impossible to fight.

......

Now.

Inside the Golden God Department.

The Golden Slayer Ancient Demon, the Realm Red Ancient Demon, the Golden Slayer Ancient Demon, and other ancient demon-level beings were all discussing this matter.

"Everyone, let's talk about it, what should I do with that Heavenly Emperor level?"

The Golden Slayer Ancient Demon asked.

Several Ancient Demon-level beings expressed their opinions.

"Let many emperor-level existences urge the formation to attack and kill the sky, maybe you can surround and kill it!"

"This method doesn't work, it's not that the Dragon Disciple Tribe doesn't have other emperor-level existences, they can do the same. And in this way, the other party can escape, and it is difficult to make the opponent 04 side surrounded, and let many emperors have time to combine into a formation. "

"Or find a way to make Wei's strength skyrocket again. "

"Wei's strength is almost at its limit, unless he breaks through the multi-particle form again and reaches the second form of the multi-particle form, but even if it is an ancient demon-level existence, it is difficult to get there, and Wei can't do it. "

"There is another way, that is, to invite other emperor-level existences, I remember that there are emperor-level existences that are more powerful than Wei, it is not nothing, you can spend a lot of money to invite them to join our Golden God Department temporarily, and then kill the sky!"

"Invite other emperors, maybe you can, but who to invite, this will have to pay a lot of price. "

"Please be the emperor-level existence of the Water Ripple Tribe-Aoi!"

"Aoi, this son is indeed powerful, the thirty-sixth on the list of the Emperor of the Abyss of Aromu, and Wei is only ranked one hundred and twenty-one after all, if it is Aoi, there is indeed hope to kill the sky, and we have a very good relationship with the Water Yang Department, pay some price, we should be able to ask Aoi to help." "

At this time, Jieequ said: "I'll go to the Aoi Water Department, please move Aoi to help!"

"Good!"

The Golden Demon agreed.

......

Now.

Ye Tian didn't know that the Golden God Department had invited foreign aid, and he had now gathered the battle record of exchanging the Ultimate Gujian Fragments, after all, he had killed too many emperor-level existences during this time, including some emperor-level beings on the battle record bounty list.

So, he went directly to the Dragon Disciple Tribe to exchange for one of the ultimate Gujian fragments.

When Ye Tian came to redeem it, Long Ying was present in person, and even envied Ye Tian.

After all, one of the ultimate Gujian fragments, even for him, is an unimaginable treasure, he wants it!

However, he did not dare to hide this kind of exchange privately, otherwise it would be against Proz's order to let Lord Proz know.

Besides, this war is very important, they still need Ye Tian, if Ye Tian runs, then if the war is lost, their dragon disciple tribe will be completely abolished, and they will lose their territory, and Lord Proz will also lose a vast territory, and they will have to compete with other forces again for resources and land.

However, in today's era, the territory has been divided, where is it so easy to find the right place for yourself!

Therefore, Pleoz is very important to this war, and does not allow any Ancient Demon level to have a victory factor that destroys this war.

Soon.

Long Ying took a piece of the Ultimate Ancient Jian Fragment and handed it to Ye Tian.

"So small!"

Ye Tian said darkly, and didn't say it, but this piece was indeed too small, at least three times smaller than Haru's Ultimate Gujian fragment.

But this is also the ultimate Gu Jian, no matter how small it is, it is enough to make the Gu Demon level extremely excited!

So, he gladly took one of the ultimate ancient artifact fragments.

At this time, Long Ying asked, "God, do you want to sell this Ultimate Ancient Scripture?"

"Lord Dragon Shadow Ancient Demon, I also need this Ultimate Ancient Scripture, so I won't sell it for the time being. If I can comprehend the Ultimate Rule Realm, and this Ultimate Ancient Treasure still exists, then I can sell it to Lord Dragon Shadow Ancient Demon. "

Ye Tian said.

Long Ying sighed, waiting for Ye Tian to comprehend the Ultimate Rule Realm, how long it would take, the Ultimate Ancient Jian Fragment would definitely not exist!

After all, to comprehend the Ultimate Ancient Scripture, it must slowly consume its power, and it is impossible for it to still exist.

Then.

Ye Tian asked, "Lord Dragon Shadow Ancient Demon, I fought with the Golden God Sect's Wei before, and Wei performed a secret method called the Multi-Particle Form, what kind of secret method is this?"

"Multi-particle form!" Long Ying introduced, "This is one of the three top secret methods of the Golden God Sect, after successful cultivation, although it will affect the difficulty of breaking through the ancient demon level, it is not like other secret methods that will make the emperor level lose the opportunity to break through. Therefore, some emperor-level people will try to cultivate secret methods such as multi-particle forms, but those who have achieved it are extremely rare. For example, the multi-particle form is the only one of the three top secret methods of the Golden God Department that can make the strength change drastically, I only know that Wei has practiced, but I can imagine the difficulty of cultivating it!"

Ye Tian asked.

"No!" Dragon Shadow shook his head, "The Dragon Disciple Tribe was originally only a subsidiary tribe of the Golden God Ministry, and it was not enough to have a foundation, so naturally this kind of secret method did not exist. Perhaps, Lord Proz has such a secret method, but now that 627 is a time of war, even if there is such a secret method, there is no time to cultivate. "

Ye Tian knew that the Dragon Disciple Tribe did not have this kind of secret method, so he stopped asking.

But he does have some interest in the secret method of multi-particle form, and the combat power has been increased too much!

After obtaining the Ultimate Gujian Fragment, Ye Tian retreated to comprehend this Ultimate Gujian Fragment.

I have to say that the value of the Ultimate Gujian fragment is far from being comparable to the breath of the Ultimate Gujian, and with the help of the deduction and analysis of the Ultimate Gubao Demon Ancient Mirror, Ye Tian sacrificed a replica body to comprehend the mystery of the Ultimate Rule Realm.

He had already comprehended the power of the rudiments of the Ultimate Rule Realm, and now he continued to comprehend it, and it was extremely efficient.

Originally, he could only show a little bit of the power of the Ultimate Rule Realm Prototype, but now he could gradually burst out with more power of the Ultimate Rule Realm Prototype.

And the other side.

The Golden God Department and the Water Yang Department are also negotiating, although the relationship between the two tribes is very good, but Aoi is on an important battlefield, if he is temporarily transferred back, he will have to pay a certain price.

At present, the two sides have not negotiated well, and the Ministry of Water is not in a hurry, but it is the Ministry of the Golden God that is in a hurry, so the Ministry of Water is full of prices.

After a lengthy discussion, the Golden God Department finally decided to transfer Aoi back to assist the Golden God Ministry, and the Golden God Department also paid an unimaginable reward!.
